description_long: This is a classic moped-style scooter with a robust metal frame and a long, cushioned seat designed for one or two riders. The scooter features two large spoked wheels, a prominent exhaust pipe on the right side, and a pair of upward-curving handlebars with rearview mirrors. The body is mostly dark, with subtle striping and branding visible on the side panel. The front includes a rounded headlight integrated into the handlebar assembly, while the rear has a small fender and taillight. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for urban commuting and short-distance travel.
description: A classic moped-style scooter with a dark metal frame, long cushioned seat, and upward-curving handlebars, featuring large wheels and visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded headlight, upward-curving handlebars with mirrors, and the narrow front wheel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the seat, the side panel with branding, and the large front and rear wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillight, rear fender, and the back of the seat and handlebars.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust pipe, the full profile of the seat, and the overall silhouette of the scooter.
attribute_deck_design: elongated, narrow, and smooth with a slightly raised rear section for the seat
attribute_brand_logo: White 'Motobecane' text logo on the left side panel
